---
title: 'Painting'
date: '2015-11-15T20:59:00.0030000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'Creatives'' Space'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '1764262149642170491'
blogger_filename: '/p/painting.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Creatives_ Space/feed.atom'
---

<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<a href="http://www.amazon.com/gp/product/B00V4EG6D6/ref=as_li_tl?ie=UTF8&amp;camp=1789&amp;creative=390957&amp;creativeASIN=B00V4EG6D6&amp;linkCode=as2&amp;tag=your0f4d-20&amp;linkId=6UTGZV2ZMPHY7COC" rel="nofollow">Heartybay® 10Pcs Artists Paint Brush Set Acrylic Watercolor Round Pointed Tip Nylon Hair</a><img alt="" border="0" src="http://ir-na.amazon-adsystem.com/e/ir?t=your0f4d-20&amp;l=as2&amp;o=1&amp;a=B00V4EG6D6" height="1" style="border: none !important; margin: 0px !important;" width="1" />

<br />
<br />
<iframe frameborder="0" marginheight="0" marginwidth="0" scrolling="no" src="//ws-na.amazon-adsystem.com/widgets/q?ServiceVersion=20070822&amp;OneJS=1&amp;Operation=GetAdHtml&amp;MarketPlace=US&amp;source=ss&amp;ref=ss_til&amp;ad_type=product_link&amp;tracking_id=your0f4d-20&amp;marketplace=amazon&amp;region=US&amp;placement=B00V4EG6D6&amp;asins=B00V4EG6D6&amp;linkId=YFBSMSHMGMLNQHOG&amp;show_border=true&amp;link_opens_in_new_window=true" style="height: 240px; width: 120px;"></iframe><br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
